scope.target: Resolve D1-D12 before rewriting canonical Use Case and Handler standards
constraints: Do not infer unresolved invocation, naming, query symmetry, or compatibility policy
Preserve approved repository and consistency decisions
Do not rewrite canonical standards until attachment differences are re-decided

inputs.architecture_target: One approved inbound-port and handler-adapter model
review_findings: Current repository contains two competing synchronous entry models
user_constraints: Use Case and Handler are separate
Normal synchronous API behavior does not publish a Command
Use a sub-agent to produce the Traditional Chinese Taiwan workflow-plan translation after decisions are resolved
Keep the English workflow plan canonical

steps: Review each decision with concrete before/after dependency chains
Record approved decisions in the workflow plan
validation: D1-D12 are approved, rejected, or explicitly deferred
No later stage depends on an unanswered role definition

results.summary: Compared the supplied D1-D12 decisions with the attached discussion, received explicit R1-R4 redecisions, and recorded the approved architecture decisions in the canonical workflow plan.
tests_run: Task JSON parsed with PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json
English and zh-TW plans match on 31 headings, 10 code fences, 12 decisions, and 6 stages
